prompt:
Subject:
Feet kicking clouds

Main Subject:
A portrait-oriented (4:5) fantasy photograph-style visual. A natural and realistic woman is prominently placed slightly to the left of the center, running lightly across the clouds. The full figure is visible, occupying approximately 70% of the screen from the upper body to the feet. Thick white cumulus clouds spread across the lower half, while the upper half consists of a clear blue sky with small clouds creating negative space.

Character and Expression:
Soft Japanese features. Profile-leaning face looking left, with gaze directed slightly ahead in the direction of movement. Mouth softly closed, with calm eyebrows and eyes. Medium-length dark brown hair naturally flowing backward in the wind. A sophisticated hair ornament resembling tsumami zaiku, combining small white flowers and delicate lace, is tucked behind the ear.

Clothing and Pose:
Summer-style white short-sleeved mini dress. Made of light cotton layered with thin chiffon, featuring puffy rounded sleeves and a waist tied lightly with a thin ribbon. The skirt is above-knee length with subtle ruffles and small embroidery at the hem. Captured at the moment of running towards the left. The left hand is lightly extended in front of the chest, while the right arm flows behind. The front leg steps on a cloud, and the back leg extends straight into the air. Bare toes are naturally visible, and the fabric and hair stream backwards in the same wind direction.

Background and Light:
A high midsummer sky. Soft, puffy white clouds in the foreground and at the feet, a large cloud the person is on in the middle ground, and layers of hazy clouds in the distance. Warm sunlight streams from the lower left, brightly illuminating the person's cheeks, arms, knees, and the edges of the dress. Shadows fall thinly towards the lower right, and white reflections from the clouds envelop the skin and clothes. The sky is a transparent light blue, with a hint of blue in the cloud shadows.

Composition and Camera:
Camera looking up from a slightly low angle. Some negative space is left on the left side (direction of travel), while movement is created on the right with the skirt and the extension of the back leg. Focus is on the face and upper body, with the clouds at the feet soft and the foreground clouds slightly blurred. A natural perspective that isn't too wide-angle conveys the vastness of the sky and a sense of floating.

Texture and Style:
High-definition fantasy photographic expression. Skin retains natural texture and isn't overly smoothed. The white clothing features delicate fabric translucency, fine wrinkles, embroidery, and detailed ruffle shadows. Clouds are soft like cotton with a three-dimensional feel from light. A bright, high-key tone, a clean summer sky, light film grain, and a transparent finish.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, deformed feet, poor fabric-body contact, broken floating sensation, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, collapsed cloud texture, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.
